name: SEP Firmware Loader
description: Loads Apple SEP firmware, splitting it into individually addressed Mach-O modules
longdescription: Parses the Legion2 SEP firmware header, extracts every embedded Mach-O (boot stub, kernel, SEPOS root-server, all SEP apps, shared library), maps each one at a distinct 4 GiB-aligned virtual address range, creates properly typed sections, adds entry points, symbols, and optionally resolves shared-library GOT references. No external dependencies.
author: matteyeux
